Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=700}

TextBlock.Text: Ordering Ships to Return to Formation

Run.Text: Good work, Commander. Now let's order Narvik to return to formation by right clicking on it and then hitting Formation and then Return to Formation.
This will order Narvik back to its original station within the formation. You can again use time compression to watch the ship move back to its station.
